_comment: Routing ban rules + capability restrictions. (1) 'rules': each rule names a target vampMid or gatewayFid that must receive ZERO traffic matching ALL listed field conditions. Fields enforced at the routing grain: rpgt, currency, bin (matched against the BIN-level bank). country is NOT enforceable as a ban (not part of the routing grain) and such rules are ignored with a warning. (2) 'usa_only_gateways': explicit list of gatewayFids that can ONLY process country='USA'. Enforced exactly like wallet capability (processWallet): the gateway keeps only the USA fraction of each Currency x Bank cell and its Non-USA portion is redistributed to the other eligible gateways in the cell. Add new USA-only gateways here by hand. Wallet capability itself is handled separately via the processWallet column in Master_MID_List.csv.
_comment_explore: gatewayFids to treat as eligible candidates even with NO 30-day attempts, so capable-but-untested gateways can earn exploration volume. They are added to every routing cell of their currency (from Master_MID_List), seeded at volume 0 / baseline 0, scored on the pooled prior success rate, and given the exploration floor. The VAMP cap and all other constraints still govern them. Empty = off (default).
